reason: Verified agent communication: sent "Hello! What is 2+2?" to QA-20260723-162940-nrnd agent and received correct response "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260723-162940-nrnd" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded, session URL changed to /agents/qa-20260723-162940-nrnd-wclk370hg6
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" in both sidebar and main view header
Clicked on message input field — Input field focused and ready for text entry
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message text successfully entered in input field
Clicked Send button — Message submitted, session created with name "Basic Math Question Session", agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response (polling activity indicator) — Agent completed processing in approximately 1 second, activity indicator disappeared
Verified response content — Response shows "4" in the message list, exactly matching the expected answer to 2+2
Took final screenshot — step6-response-verified.png captured showing user message, agent response "4", and session status
